verses.geez: ወኀለየት ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ወባረቅ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወትቤ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ተኀሊ ።

translations.lxx: And Debbora and Barac son of Abineem sang in that day, saying,
translations.kjv: Then sang Deborah and Barak the son of Abinoam on that day, saying,

verses.geez: ሶበ ፡ አኀዙ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በሕሊና ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይባርክዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: A revelation was made in Israel when the people were made willing: Praise ye the Lord.
translations.kjv: Praise ye the LORD for the avenging of Israel, when the people willingly offered themselves.

verses.geez: ስምዑ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ወአጽምዑ ፡ መኳንንተ ፡ ጽኑዓን ፡ አንሰ ፡ አኀሊ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ [አምላከ ፡] እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: Hear, ye kings, and hearken, rulers: I will sing, it is I who will sing to the Lord, it is I, I will sing a psalm to the Lord the God of Israel.
translations.kjv: Hear, O ye kings; give ear, O ye princes; I, even I, will sing unto the LORD; I will sing praise to the LORD God of Israel.

verses.geez:
እግዚኦ ፡ በፀአትከ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ሶበ ፡ ተንሣእከ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሐቅለ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ ምድር ፡ አድለቅለቀት ፡ ወሰማይ
                  ፡ ደንገፀት ፡ ወደመናትኒ ፡ አንጠብጠ[ቡ] ፡ ማ[የ] ።

translations.lxx: O Lord, in thy going forth on Seir, when thou wentest forth out of the land of Edom, the earth quaked and the heaven dropped dews, and the clouds dropped water.
translations.kjv: LORD, when thou wentest out of Seir, when thou marchedst out of the field of Edom, the earth trembled, and the heavens dropped, the clouds also dropped water.

verses.geez:
ወአድባር ፡ ተከውሱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሲና ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ።

translations.lxx: The mountains were shaken before the face of the Lord Eloi, this Sina before the face of the Lord God of Israel.
translations.kjv: The mountains melted from before the LORD, even that Sinai from before the LORD God of Israel.

verses.geez:
በመዋዕለ ፡ ሴሜጌር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ቄነት ፡ ወበመዋዕለ ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ኀልቁ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ፍናዌ ፡ መብእሰ ፡ ፍናዌ
                  ፡ ግፍቱኣተ ።

translations.lxx: In the days of Samegar son of Anath, in the days of Jael, they deserted the ways, and went in by-ways; they went in crooked paths.
translations.kjv: In the days of Shamgar the son of Anath, in the days of Jael, the highways were unoccupied, and the travellers walked through byways.

verses.geez:
ወኀልቁ ፡ መፈክራን ፡ እምነ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኀልቁ ፡ [እስከ ፡] ተንሥአት ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ እስ[ከ] ፡ ቆመት ፡ እም ፡
                  ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: The mighty men in Israel failed, they failed until Debbora arose, until she arose a mother in Israel.
translations.kjv: The inhabitants of the villages ceased, they ceased in Israel, until that I Deborah arose, that I arose a mother in Israel.

verses.geez:
ወሠምሩ ፡ በአማልክተ ፡ ከንቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ስገም ፡ ሶበ ፡ ይከድንዎ ፡ ውዕዩ ፡ አርማሕ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ እልፍ ፡
                  አርማሕ ።

translations.lxx: They chose new gods; then the cities of rulers fought; there was not a shield or spear seen among forty thousand in Israel.
translations.kjv: They chose new gods; then was war in the gates: was there a shield or spear seen among forty thousand in Israel?

verses.geez: ልብየሰ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘትእዛዞ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ኀያላኒሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ባርክዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: My heart inclines to the orders given in Israel; ye that are willing among the people, bless the Lord.
translations.kjv: My heart is toward the governors of Israel, that offered themselves willingly among the people. Bless ye the LORD.

verses.geez: እለ ፡ ትጼዐኑ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አእዱግ ፡ [ፅዕድዋን ፡] ወትነብሩ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ብርሃን ፡ ንብቡ ፡ ቃለክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Ye that mount a she-ass at noon-day, ye that sit on the judgment-seat, and walk by the roads of them that sit in judgment by the way; declare
translations.kjv: Speak, ye that ride on white asses, ye that sit in judgment, and walk by the way.

verses.geez:
ወሰንቅዉ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ፍሡሓን ፡ ወበህየ ፡ ይሁቡ ፡ ጽድቀ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወጽድቀ ፡ [አጽ]ንዐ ፡ በውስተ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ወረደ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አህጉሪሁ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: ye that are delivered from the noise of disturbers among the drawers of water; there shall they relate righteous acts: O Lord, increase righteous acts in Israel: then the people of the Lord went down to the cities.
translations.kjv: They that are delivered from the noise of archers in the places of drawing water, there shall they rehearse the righteous acts of the LORD, even the righteous acts toward the inhabitants of his villages in Israel: then shall the people of the LORD go down to the gates.

verses.geez:
ተንሥኢ ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ወአንሥኢ ፡ አእላፈ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ተንሥኢ ፡ ተንሥኢ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ማኅሌት ፡ ወበኀይል ፡ ተንሥእ
                  ፡ ባረቅ ፡ ወጸንዒዮ ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ለባረቅ ፡ ወፄውው ፡ ፄዋከ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቢኔሔም ፡ ከመ ፡ አመ ፡ ዐብየ ፡ ኀይሉ
                  ።

translations.lxx: Awake, awake, Debbora; awake, awake, utter a song: arise, Barac, and lead thy captivity captive, son of Abineem.
translations.kjv: Awake, awake, Deborah: awake, awake, utter a song: arise, Barak, and lead thy captivity captive, thou son of Abinoam.

verses.geez: እግዚኦ ፡ አድክሞሙ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይጸንዑኒ ።

translations.lxx: Then went down the remnant to the strong, the people of the Lord went down for him among the mighty ones from me.
translations.kjv: Then he made him that remaineth have dominion over the nobles among the people: the LORD made me have dominion over the mighty.

verses.geez:
ሕዝበ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ (ወ)ቀሰፎሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፤ እኁከ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በሕዝብከ ፤ እምኔየ ፡ ማኪር ፡ ወረዱ ፡
                  ይፍትኑ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ዛቡሎን ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይፀብእ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ኀያላን ፡ እምህየ ፡ [በበ]ትረ ፡ ኀይለ ፡ ነገር
                  ።

translations.lxx: Ephraim rooted them out in Amalec, behind thee was Benjamin among thy people: the inhabitants of Machir came down with me searching out the enemy, and from Zabulon came they that draw with the scribe's pen of record.
translations.kjv: Out of Ephraim was there a root of them against Amalek; after thee, Benjamin, among thy people; out of Machir came down governors, and out of Zebulun they that handle the pen of the writer.

verses.geez:
ወእምውስተ ፡ ይሳኮር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ፈነወ ፡ አጋርያኒሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፡ ከመ ፡ ትንበር ፡ አንተ ፡ ማእከለ ፡
                  ከናፍር ፡ ወሰፍሐ ፡ በእገሪሁ ፡ ናፍቆ ፡ ሮቤል ፤ ዐቢይ ፡ ጥይቅና ፡ ልቡ ።

translations.lxx: And princes in Issachar were with Debbora and Barac, thus she sent Barac on his feet in the valleys into the portions of Ruben; great pangs reached to the heart.
translations.kjv: And the princes of Issachar were with Deborah; even Issachar, and also Barak: he was sent on foot into the valley. For the divisions of Reuben there were great thoughts of heart.

verses.geez:
ለምንት ፡ ሊተ ፡ ትነብር ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሞሶጴተም ፡ ከመ ፡ ታጽምእ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትፋጸዩ ፡ እለ ፡ ይትነሥኡ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይኅልፉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘሮቤል ።

translations.lxx: Why did they sit between the sheep-folds to hear the bleating of flocks for the divisions of Ruben? there were great searchings of heart.
translations.kjv: Why abodest thou among the sheepfolds, to hear the bleatings of the flocks? For the divisions of Reuben there were great searchings of heart.

verses.geez:
ዐቢይ ፡ አሰረ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለገላአድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ኀደረ ፤ ወዳን ፡ ለምንት ፡ ይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አሕማር ፤ ወአሴርሰ ፡ ነበረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐይቀ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ወሰኑ ፡ ነበረ ።

translations.lxx: Galaad is on the other side of Jordan where he pitched his tents; and why does Dan remain in ships? Aser sat down on the sea-coasts, and he will tabernacle at his ports.
translations.kjv: Gilead abode beyond Jordan: and why did Dan remain in ships? Asher continued on the sea shore, and abode in his breaches.

verses.geez: ዛቡሎን ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘዐየረ ፡ ነፍሶ ፡ ለሞት ፡ ወንፍታሌም ፡ ውስተ ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ሐቅል ።

translations.lxx: The people Zabulon exposed their soul to death, and Nephthali came to the high places of their land.
translations.kjv: Zebulun and Naphtali were a people that jeoparded their lives unto the death in the high places of the field.

verses.geez:
ወመጽኡ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ወተቃተሉ ፡ ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ተቃተሉ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ ከናአን ፡ በተናኅ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ማየ ፡ መጌዶ ፡
                  ወኢነሥ[ኡ] ፡ በትእግልት ፡ ብሩረ ።

translations.lxx: Kings set themselves in array, then the kings of Chanaan fought in Thanaach at the water of Mageddo; they took no gift of money.
translations.kjv: The kings came and fought, then fought the kings of Canaan in Taanach by the waters of Megiddo; they took no gain of money.

verses.geez: ወበሰማይ ፡ ተፃብኡ ፡ ከዋክብት ፡ እምነ ፡ ቀትሎሙ ፡ ወተቃተሉ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሲሳራ ።

translations.lxx: The stars from heaven set themselves in array, they set themselves to fight with Sisara out of their paths.
translations.kjv: They fought from heaven; the stars in their courses fought against Sisera.

verses.geez: ወአውፅኦሙ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ቂሶን ፡ ወፈለገ ፡ ቀዴሚን ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ቂሶን ፤ ነፍስየ ፡ ጽንዒ ።

translations.lxx: The brook of Kison swept them away, the ancient brook, the brook Kison: my mighty soul will trample him down.
translations.kjv: The river of Kishon swept them away, that ancient river, the river Kishon. O my soul, thou hast trodden down strength.

verses.geez: ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ተቀጥቀጠ ፡ ሰኰና ፡ አፍራሲሆሙ ፡ ለአማዳሮት ።

translations.lxx: When the hoofs of the horse were entangled, his mighty ones earnestly hasted
translations.kjv: Then were the horsehoofs broken by the means of the pransings, the pransings of their mighty ones.

verses.geez:
ወኀያላኒሁ ፡ ይረግም[ዋ] ፡ ለማዞር ፡ ወይቤ ፡ መልአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በመርገም ፡ ርግምዎሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አብያቲሃ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢመጽኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ረድኤተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምነ ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡ ጽኑዓን ።

translations.lxx: to curse Meroz: Curse ye it, said the angel of the Lord; cursed is every one that dwells in it, because they came not to the help of the Lord, to his help among the mighty.
translations.kjv: Curse ye Meroz, said the angel of the LORD, curse ye bitterly the inhabitants thereof; because they came not to the help of the LORD, to the help of the LORD against the mighty.

verses.geez:
ቡርክተ ፡ ትኩን ፡ እምነ ፡ አንስት ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ [ካቤር ፡] ቄንያዊ ፡ እምነ ፡ አንስት ፡ ቡርክት ፡ በውስተ
                  ፡ ደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: Blessed among women be Jael wife of Chaber the Kenite; let her be blessed above women in tents.
translations.kjv: Blessed above women shall Jael the wife of Heber the Kenite be, blessed shall she be above women in the tent.

verses.geez: ማየ ፡ ሰአለ ፡ ወሐሊበ ፡ ወሀበቶ ፡ ወበዐይገን ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ አቅረበት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ዕቋነ ።

translations.lxx: He asked for water, she gave him milk in a dish; she brought butter of princes.
translations.kjv: He asked water, and she gave him milk; she brought forth butter in a lordly dish.

verses.geez:
ወበእዴሃ ፡ እንተ ፡ ፀጋም ፡ ተመጠወት ፡ መትከለ ፡ ወበየማና ፡ ጐድአት ፡ ወቀተለቶ ፡ ለሲሳፌ ፡ ወቀጥቀጠቶ ፡ ርእሶ ፡
                  ወደመቀቶ ፡ መልታሕቶ ።

translations.lxx: She stretched forth her left hand to the nail, and her right hand to the workman's hammer, and she smote Sisara with it, she nailed through his head and smote him; she nailed through his temples.
translations.kjv: She put her hand to the nail, and her right hand to the workmen’s hammer; and with the hammer she smote Sisera, she smote off his head, when she had pierced and stricken through his temples.

verses.geez: ወተራገፀ ፡ በማእከለ ፡ እገሪሃ ፡ ወበኀበ ፡ ተራገፀ ፡ በህየ ፡ ኀስረ ።

translations.lxx: He rolled down between her feet; he fell and lay between her feet; he bowed and fell: where he bowed, there he fell dead.
translations.kjv: At her feet he bowed, he fell, he lay down: at her feet he bowed, he fell: where he bowed, there he fell down dead.

verses.geez:
ወእንተ ፡ መስኮት ፡ ትኄውጽ ፡ እሙ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሠቅሠቅ ፡ ትሬኢ ፡ እመቦ ፡ ዘገብአ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡
                  ወበበይነ ፡ ምንት ፡ ተደኀረ ፡ ሰረገላሁ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ በጺሐ ፡ ወበበይነ ፡ ምንት ፡ ጐንደያ ፡ እግረ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ።

translations.lxx: The mother of Sisara looked down through the window out of the loophole, saying, Why was his chariot ashamed? why did the wheels of his chariots tarry?
translations.kjv: The mother of Sisera looked out at a window, and cried through the lattice, Why is his chariot so long in coming? why tarry the wheels of his chariots?

verses.geez: ጠቢባተ ፡ መልአካ ፡ ላቲ ፡ (ወ)አውሥኣሃ ፡ ወእማንቱሴ ፡ አውሥኣሃ ፡ በከመ ፡ ቃላ ።

translations.lxx: Her wise ladies answered her, and she returned answers to herself, saying,
translations.kjv: Her wise ladies answered her, yea, she returned answer to herself,

verses.geez:
አኮኑ ፡ ረከባሁ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይከፍል ፡ ምህርካ ፡ ወይትዓረክ ፡ አዕርክቱ ፡ በላዕለ ፡ አርእስቲሆሙ ፡ ለኀያላን ፡ በርበረ
                  ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ በርበረ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወዘዘዚአሁ ፡ ጥምዐተ ፡ ሕበሪሁ ፡ ወዐሥቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክሣዱ ፡ ዘበርበረ ።

translations.lxx: Will they not find him dividing the spoil? he will surely be gracious to every man: there are spoils of dyed garments for Sisara, spoils of various dyed garments, dyed embroidered garments, they are the spoils for his neck.
translations.kjv: Have they not sped? have they not divided the prey; to every man a damsel or two; to Sisera a prey of divers colours, a prey of divers colours of needlework, of divers colours of needlework on both sides, meet for the necks of them that take the spoil?

verses.geez:
ከማሁ ፡ ለይትሐጐሉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ፀርከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ወእለሰ ፡ ያፈቅሩከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ፀሓይ ፡ በኀይሉ ። ወአዕረፈት
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ፵ዓመ ።

translations.lxx: Thus let all thine enemies perish, O Lord: and they that love him shall be as the going forth of the sun in his strength. And the land had rest forty years.
translations.kjv: So let all thine enemies perish, O LORD: but let them that love him be as the sun when he goeth forth in his might. And the land had rest forty years.
